reviews.review_description: Why is it that when I enter I spawn into this random house and I can’t go to any maps and I can do anything. Where is the actual gameplay dude. 😡

reviews.review_title: i liked the old version better
reviews.review_description: ggg

Hey... I really liked the old one.. The one where it had Valcano, it had more monsters, it had a bridge in forest to tree house, and in canyons it had a lot of monsters too, a spider web and a spider, and i really miss the sound board where u could play music while playing, and i miss the good grapics, and the old cosmetics, the eye cosmetic, the gasmask, the knife (red blood splat) and there was more... I really miss the old one though, and ive been playing for a while, since April, and i just really miss the old one, and PLEASE add the backrooms back PLEASE!! this game used to be so nostalgic for me and i loved that, me and my friends used to play it all the time, but then we couldnt because theres no backrooms... I would just really love if u could bring the old one back :) thank you. -@Pookie_x-n5w (my YT)

I was in their discord and I got a announcement ping and the developer said that te game is officially back I'm so happy because before the game shut down I used to play this game alot and it was my all time favorite game so I'm so glad to see it's back
I played this game like 6 months ago and it was fun, but I think it’s back. So tell me if it’s back or not.. crystals out!

This I think one of my first gorilla tag horror game I played and man it was so fun so I started playing it everyday. than it shut down and never opened up again so I want to bring it back and remember all the MEMORIES I had. so please come back

reviews.review_title: Do not get this, i got banned.
reviews.review_description: i got banned for my “oculus hash”??? what even is that??? this game used to be good.
i like the game but add more maps!!!!

Pls come back i used to play this game all the time when it was pride month but the shutdown first i thought it was a shutdown update but no it got shut down but then it came back i was so releved but then you shutdown AGAIN BUT PLS COME BACK BEST HORROR GAME OF ALL TIME

reviews.review_title: (Please read)Good game but now I’m sad☹️
reviews.review_description: So this is a very good game. Lots of jumpscares and lots of fun. And custom maps and cosmetics. But there is this glitch (I’m not putting it in here so you don’t get banned like me) where you can escape the map and get onto the lava in city. And there’s a secret monster that I’m pretty sure is called “flower boy.” I did this glitch three or four times and the last time I got banned FOREVER. I understand the consequences of my actions, and I’d please like my ban to be lowered down from forever to 3-5 weeks. Please and thank you.

( it was fun while it lasted)
